name: LLM Agent Chat
description: LLM-backed transition function for agents. Maintains conversation history in agent state. Reads LLM configuration from the agent's config (provider, model, systemPrompt). The API key is resolved from the user's secret store using the name declared in operation metadata. Processes all inbox messages as user turns and generates an assistant response.

state.description: Previous conversation state (null on first run). Contains 'history' array of role/content pairs.

messages.description: Inbox messages to process as user turns

apiKey.description: Optional API key override for testing. WARNING: will appear in plaintext in job results.

state.description: Updated conversation state with appended history

result.description: Contains 'response' with the assistant's reply text
